title: oxytropis neglecta subsp. amethystea
intro: Oxytropis neglecta subsp. amethystea, commonly known as the Amethyst Mountain Milkvetch, is a plant species within the Oxytropis genus, specifically a subspecies of the Oxytropis neglecta plant. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Oxytropis neglecta subsp. amethystea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in herbal infusions or dried for later use in herbal remedies.
